summary: Completed frontend testing of Market Regime panel and Chart Price Lines features. All 12 test cases passed. Market Regime panel correctly displays unified regime classification (RISK-ON/TRANSITIONAL/RISK-OFF) based on VIX, Yield Curve, and Gamma/ZGL signals. Chart price lines (POC, VAH, VAL, Call Wall, Put Wall, ZGL) render correctly with proper colors and update when switching symbols.
passed_tests: ✅ Market Regime panel renders with data-testid='market-regime-panel'
✅ Regime label shows 'TRANSITIONAL' (valid values: RISK-ON, TRANSITIONAL, RISK-OFF)
✅ Regime score renders with data-testid='market-regime-score' showing '6/9'
✅ VIX component signal present in Market Regime panel (showing ELEVATED)
✅ Yield Curve component signal present in Market Regime panel (showing NORMAL)
✅ Gamma/ZGL component signal present in Market Regime panel (showing LONG Γ +GEX)
✅ Chart levels legend renders with data-testid='chart-levels-legend'
✅ POC price line in legend (yellow color - text-yellow-400)
✅ VAH price line in legend (green color - text-emerald-400)
✅ VAL price line in legend (red color - text-red-400)
✅ Call Wall price line in legend (cyan color - text-cyan-400)
✅ Put Wall price line in legend (pink color - text-pink-400)
✅ ZGL price line in legend (violet color - text-violet-400)
✅ Price lines update correctly when switching symbols (MNQ → MES → MYM → MNQ)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses real API data from /api/analyze endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Regime panel and Chart Price Lines features fully tested. Market Regime combines 3 macro signals: VIX regime (0-3 pts), Yield Curve state (0-3 pts), Gamma/ZGL signal (0-3 pts). Total max=9. Score determines regime: >=75% = RISK-ON, >=50% = TRANSITIONAL, <50% = RISK-OFF. Current state shows TRANSITIONAL (6/9). Price lines on chart use lightweight-charts v5 createPriceLine API. Gamma levels (Call Wall/Put Wall/ZGL) are converted from ETF to futures price using ratio = futures_current_price / etf_spot_price. All data-testid attributes in place for automated testing.

feature_verification.regime_label: Working - Shows TRANSITIONAL (valid: RISK-ON, TRANSITIONAL, RISK-OFF)
feature_verification.regime_description: Working - Shows contextual description based on regime
feature_verification.vix_signal: Working - Shows ELEVATED with score indicator
feature_verification.yield_curve_signal: Working - Shows NORMAL with score indicator
feature_verification.gamma_zgl_signal: Working - Shows LONG Γ +GEX with score indicator
feature_verification.chart_levels_legend: Working - Shows POC, VAH, VAL, Call Wall, Put Wall, ZGL with correct colors
feature_verification.symbol_switch: Working - Price lines update when switching between MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K
